findings.location: s2 (編集ファイル table, W11AC0202.jsp row)
findings.description: The table row for W11AC0202.jsp contains fabricated content. The knowledge file assigns stereotype "View" and description "確認画面JSP。n:confirmationPageタグで入力画面JSPを取り込む。" to W11AC0202.jsp. In the source table, the W11AC0202.jsp entry is a continuation of the same row as W11AC0201.jsp and has empty cells for both ステレオタイプ and 処理内容. Neither the stereotype nor the description appears in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source table row 2: `| | :download:\`W11AC0202.jsp<...>\`|                |                                                                                                                                               |` — both ステレオタイプ and 処理内容 columns are empty.
